<!-- source-snippet repo="scribe" path="docs/user/sdlc-howtos/applications/develop/pqs/index.rst" commit="9066c81716d62cbb879e677d5bec96bb5324891f" snippet="scribe-rst-code-docs-user-sdlc-howtos-applications-develop-pqs-index-sql-175" location="lines:175-179" -->
```sql
   select * 
   from creates(from_offset := 'last_memoized_offset')
   where created_at_offset > 'last_memoized_offset'
   order by created_at_offset;

```
